basic_info.center_sub_title: Experience Precision and Compassionate Care in Banashankari
basic_info.center_description:
We’re thrilled to introduce your go-to destination for all your diagnostic requirements! Cadabams Diagnostics Banashankari. Our center in Banashankari offers precise and effective diagnostic services, helping detect and treat a wide range of medical issues.

We take immense pride in offering a complete suite of diagnostic tests which include laboratory assessments, radiology, and imaging procedures. Advanced technology and a team of experienced professionals ensure that we offer accurate and reliable diagnostic results every single time.

Our goal? Well, we aim to give you complete diagnostic solutions that help in the early detection and effective treatment of all your health concerns. Our dedication to giving you the most accurate results is something that we hold sacrosanct.

Equipped with the latest in diagnostic technology, our diagnostic center in Banashankari stands ready to deliver superior diagnostic services for any health issue you may face. At Cadabams Diagnostics, we are committed to uncovering the underlying causes of your health concerns and supporting your path to recovery and wellness.

center_info.address: No. 1/A, 1st Block, Bhavani  HBCS, Banashankari 3rd Stage, Near Devegowda petrol Bunk, Bangalore -  560070

testimonials.name: Yathindra Dharmendra
testimonials.content: Cadabams staff made both my partner and me feel welcome and comfortable from the moment we walked in. The quality of the images was amazing, and seeing our baby for the first time was an unforgettable experience. The care and attention to detail were top-notch, and it truly felt like they cared about our growing family. I highly recommend this center for any expectant parents!"

testimonials.name: Vanishree Ramachandran
testimonials.content: The centre has advanced equipments for scanning and provide the patients an accurate report. The staffs are so kind and treat with utmost care. Premises is clean and neat. Overall experience is appreciable.Could be improved in sending the hard and soft copy of the reports when requested as only one of the copies is sent and wait time of the patients must be streamlined.

faq.question: What kind of tests do you offer at Cadabam’s Diagnostics?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of diagnostic tests, including blood tests, urine tests, X-rays, ultrasounds, and more. Kindly visit our website https://cadabamsdiagnostics.com/ to see a full list of our services.

faq.question: What are your hours of operation?
faq.answer: Our working hours are Monday to Saturday, from 7:30 am to 8:00 pm, and on Sunday, from 7:30 am to 1:00 pm. We’re here to accommodate your schedule and provide services throughout the week.

faq.question: Where are your diagnostic centres located?
faq.answer:
We have five convenient branches across the city to serve you better: 


  • Banashankari – Easily accessible and centrally located, our Banashankari branch offers a full range of diagnostic services for your convenience. 
  • Indiranagar – Conveniently situated in Indiranagar, this branch provides a full spectrum of diagnostic services with a focus on patient comfort and convenience. 
  • Kalyan Nagar – Located in the heart of Kalyan Nagar, our centre provides advanced diagnostic tests and friendly service. 
  • Jayanagar – Situated in the bustling area of Jayanagar, this branch is equipped with state-of-the-art technology for all your diagnostic needs. 
  • Kanakapura Road – Our Kanakapura Road branch offers comprehensive diagnostics in a convenient and well-connected location.

faq.question: How will I receive my test results?
faq.answer: You’ll receive your test results directly via email, mobile notification, and WhatsApp once they are ready. This ensures quick and convenient access to your reports without needing to visit the centre.

Cadabam’s Diagnostics- Your Trusted Diagnostic Centre in Kanakapura Road 

Located at the centre of Kanakapura Road Cadabam’s Diagnostics is equipped with state-of-the-art diagnostic technology offerings, everything from advanced MRI imaging and high-resolution CT scans to pregnancy scans and a range of essential health checkups. 

Our diagnostic centre ensures a seamless experience with advanced laboratory tests, state-of-the-art radiology services and expert-led diagnostics. What sets us apart is our commitment to precision, efficiency and patient-centred care, making us a trusted name in healthcare.

faq.question: What are the 4 types of diagnostic testing?
Which blood test is best for a full body checkup?
faq.answer: A Comprehensive Blood Test is ideal for a full-body checkup. It includes tests like a Complete Blood Count (CBC), liver and kidney function tests, lipid profile, thyroid function, and blood glucose levels, providing a detailed overview of your health.

faq.question: How long does a diagnostic MRI take?
faq.answer: An MRI typically takes between 30 to 60 minutes, depending on the area being scanned and the complexity of the images required.

faq.question: Can CBC results be wrong?
faq.answer: While rare, CBC (Complete Blood Count) results can be inaccurate due to various factors such as improper sample handling, dehydration, or interference from certain medications. It’s always best to consult with a healthcare provider for interpretation and further testing if needed.

faq.question: Do I need a doctor’s prescription for a diagnostic test?
faq.answer: Some tests require a prescription, while others can be done on request. Contact us to check specific requirements.

basic_info.center_sub_title: Experience Precision and Compassionate Care in Indiranagar
basic_info.center_description:
Welcome to Cadabam’s Diagnostics, Indiranagar—your trusted hub for accurate and compassionate diagnostic care. Conveniently located for easy access, our Indiranagar branch is part of a wider network across Bangalore, including centres in Banashankari, Kalyan Nagar, Jayanagar, and Kanakapura Road.  

Each location is equipped with advanced technology and staffed by skilled professionals, all dedicated to supporting your health journey with precision and care. Wherever you are in the city, Cadabam’s Diagnostics ensures quality diagnostics are always close by. 

Unmatched Diagnostic Services 

Cadabam’s Diagnostics brings a broad range of high-quality diagnostic services designed for comprehensive care, including: - 

Precision 3T MRI imaging 

Advanced multi-slice CT scans 

Extensive ultrasound options, including 3D/4D fetal imaging 

Targeted elastography for liver, breast, and prostate assessments 

Full laboratory capabilities, offering: 

X-rays and mammography 

Bone density measurement (BMD) 

Fertility-focused HSG testing 

And an array of other essential health tests 

Your Partner in Preventive Health 

At Cadabam’s, we believe diagnostics are just the beginning. With a focus on early detection and preventive strategies, we’re here to support your journey to optimal health—every step of the way.

center_info.address: 725, Chinmaya Mission Hospital Rd, near CHINMAYA MISSION HOSPITAL, Indira Nagar 1st Stage, Defence Colony, Indiranagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560038

basic_info.center_description:
Cadabam's Diagnostics – Your Premier Diagnostic Centre in Kalyan Nagar 

Cadabam's Diagnostics in Kalyan Nagar, is a leading diagnostic centre for accurate and wide-ranging healthcare services.  

Equipped with high-tech machines such as high-frequency X-ray units from GE Healthcare that emit crystal-clear images at reduced radiation dose levels, we offer more services, including laboratory tests, radiology, and imaging procedures to help in the early detection and management of diseases.  

Ideally placed in Kalyan Nagar, our centre offers the convenience of accessing residents both in and out of the precinct. What's keeping us above the rest, though, is the commitment toward quality services by the precision hands of sub-specialised radiologists.  

We prepare for your comfort and convenience by making our services accessible and reliable. Choose Cadabam's Diagnostics in Kalyan Nagar for trusted insights that empower your health journey.

services.title: Laboratory Services:
services.description: Our laboratory offers a wide range of diagnostic tests for the early detection and effective management of many diseases.

services.title: MRI Scan
services.description: Our MRI scans are more high-tech. They take pictures of the internal structures in detail, further aiding in an accurate diagnosis.

services.title: CT scan
services.description: Our CT scans provide precise cross-sectional images critical in diagnosing many conditions.

services.title: Musculoskeletal (MSK) Scans
services.description: High-resolution imaging focusing on bones, joints, and soft tissues to detect any injury or disorder.

services.title: Pregnancy Scans
services.description: We perform detailed pregnancy scans to track your baby's development and ensure your well-being.

services.title: X-Ray Services
services.description: We have a GE Healthcare high-frequency X-ray unit that gives sharp images with the least possible exposure to radiation so that you remain safe

testimonials.name: Kishan Dhoj
testimonials.content: I had a very good experience at Cadabams Diagnostic Centre. The staff is professional, courteous, and makes you feel comfortable throughout the process. The facility is clean and well-maintained, and the diagnostic services are conducted efficiently with minimal waiting time. I really appreciated the detailed explanation provided after the tests, and the reports were delivered on time. Overall, I found their service reliable and trustworthy. Highly recommended for anyone looking for accurate and timely diagnostics in a caring environment

faq.question: What services does Cadabam's Diagnostics offer?
faq.answer: Cadabam's Diagnostics provides a comprehensive range of services, including laboratory tests, radiology services such as X-rays, MRIs, CT scans, and specialised imaging like musculoskeletal and pregnancy scans.

faq.question: What types of diagnostic tests are commonly performed?
faq.answer: Standard diagnostic tests include blood tests, urine tests, X-rays, MRIs, CT scans, ultrasounds, and biopsies. They aid in the diagnosis of various infections and chronic conditions.

faq.question: How do diagnostic tests help in medical treatment?
faq.answer: Diagnostic tests are essential as they provide accurate health information. They allow doctors to determine the cause of symptoms and the extent of the condition and check whether a treatment is compelling enough, which leads to targeted and potent medical care.

faq.question: How long does it take to receive results from a diagnostic test?
faq.answer: The turnaround time for results varies depending on the type of test. Some results are available within a few hours, while others may take a few days. At Cadabam's Diagnostics, we strive to provide timely and accurate results to support your healthcare needs.
